notes: User-controlled game inclusion flags for stat aggregation. Default: all games included in stats. Exhibition/scrimmage games are pre-flagged as excluded — users can override any flag via the UI (tap the star icon on a game card). This file is committed to git and serves as the persistent source of truth for which games count.
ui_hint: Each game card shows a star icon. Filled = included in stats. Empty = excluded. Tap to toggle. Changes write back to this file (admin mode) or to user-local storage (public mode).

63.label: All Stars Showcase
63.note: End-of-season All Stars game vs CDA Masters. Not a regular season result.
